flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Central Arkansas rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.6k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Central Arkansas fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Central Arkansas rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (33.9% → 41.9%).
